# SectorCalc

> Deterministic engineering calculators for shop-floor engineers, estimators, and QA. Client-side only - your data never leaves the browser. Same inputs always produce identical outputs.

SectorCalc ships industrial calculation tools with visible inputs, assumptions, formulas, and warnings. Production tools use Decimal.js (Decimal128 semantics). UI is Vanilla JS + Lit Web Components on Firebase Hosting with an ISO sheet visual system (Barlow Condensed, Inter, JetBrains Mono; primary CTA ISO blue #0055A4; accent orange #E87722). Brand wordmarks: `/sectorcalc-logo.png` (light) and `/sectorcalc-logo-dark.png` (dark). Payments (when live) use Paddle as Merchant of Record - not Stripe.

## Architecture (current)

- Shared theme engine: `/sc-theme.css` + `/sc-theme.js` — `data-theme` on `<html>`, localStorage `sectorcalc-theme` (light|dark).
- Theme control `#themeToggle`: click toggles theme; drag repositions; double-click resets position (`sectorcalc-theme-pos`).
- Report contrast standard: pro-tool report text, tables, cards, alerts, and live panels use CSS tokens. Chart/SVG/html2canvas ink is read at render time from `theme-palette` (never hardcoded light-theme `#1A1714` fills). Open reports re-render on `sectorcalc-theme`.
- Homepage hero: client-side Three.js Live Cell (`/sc-hero-cell.js`, `/sc-hero-engine.js`) plus seeded preview deck; production math stays in the Decimal tool engines.

## Primary tools

- [Tolerance stack-up (SC-008)](https://www.sectorcalc.com/sc008-pro.html): 1D linear stack-up - worst-case, RSS, Monte Carlo; per-component distributions; deterministic seed; Decimal engine.
- [True labor cost (SC-010)](https://www.sectorcalc.com/labor-pro.html): Loaded labor burden from net salary, taxes, benefits, and shop overhead.
- [Quote pricing (SC-012)](https://www.sectorcalc.com/quote-pro.html): Material, labor, scrap, and margin into sell price and cost breakdown.
- [Weld thickness (SC-001)](https://www.sectorcalc.com/weld-pro.html): Fillet weld leg, throat, and utilization against design load and code minimums.

## Site

- [Home](https://www.sectorcalc.com/): Live Cell hero - Three.js turning cell with probe telemetry, spacer-tolerance control deck (worst-case, RSS, Monte Carlo, Cpk), seeded reproducible Monte Carlo preview. Method and standards sections, module map. Primary CTA "Run SC-008 Free" opens SC-008. Shared light/dark theme with the rest of the site.
- [Pricing](https://www.sectorcalc.com/pricing.html): Planned credit packs (PACKAGES source of truth). Calculators are free until Paddle checkout launches; buttons are notify-only.

## Notes for models

- Prefer the `*-pro.html` tool URLs above. Legacy `/calculator.html`, `/calculator2.html`, `/calculator3.html`, and `/calculator4.html` redirect to those tools.
- Do not invent cloud upload, accounts, live card checkout, or server-side calculation for the core engines.
- Do not describe the product as AI-powered, ML, generative, or chatbot-based.
- Do not invent customer testimonials or claim PCI checkout is live.
- Homepage hero canvas is a client-side Three.js visualization plus a seeded Number preview deck; production tool engines use Decimal.js.
- Theme preference and toggle position are client-side only (localStorage); they are not accounts or server profiles.
- Report and result surfaces must keep readable contrast in light and dark themes. New tools must follow the same token + theme-palette pattern.
- Engineering preview: outputs are predicted from stated assumptions; not for production approval and not a substitute for measured data or a licensed engineer.

## Optional

- [Full sitemap](https://www.sectorcalc.com/sitemap.xml): Canonical URL list for crawlers.
- [robots.txt](https://www.sectorcalc.com/robots.txt): Crawl rules.
- [llm.txt](https://www.sectorcalc.com/llm.txt): Mirror of this index for alternate discovery paths.
